# Vazgro — Full Service Overview

> Vazgro is a UK digital agency offering web design, branding, AI consulting, monthly design/dev/social subscriptions, and custom product development. Based in London, serving UK SMEs and startups nationwide.

## LAUNCH Packages (Fixed-Fee, One-Off)

### Web & Digital
- **Landing Page** — £149, 3-day delivery. High-converting single page with form/booking integration.
- **Starter Site** — £199, 7-day delivery. 5-page brochure website, mobile responsive, basic SEO.
- **Business Site** — £499, 14-day delivery. Up to 10 pages with CMS, blog, full SEO. Most popular.
- **E-Commerce Starter** — £999, 21-day delivery. Shopify or WooCommerce, up to 50 products.

### Brand & Design
- **Brand Starter Kit** — £299, 7-day delivery. Logo (3 concepts), colours, typography, brand guidelines PDF.
- **Brand Pro Kit** — £599, 10-day delivery. Full brand system including business cards, email signature, social assets.

### AI & Tech
- **AI Chatbot Setup** — £799, 7-day delivery. Custom chatbot trained on your content, deployed to your website.
- **AI Readiness Audit** — £499, 5-day delivery. 15–20 page report on AI opportunities in your business.
- **Automation Quick-Win** — £599, 5-day delivery. One process automated end-to-end using Make, Zapier, or custom code.

## GROW Subscriptions (Monthly)

### Design Track
- Design Starter: £349/mo — 2 active requests, 48hr turnaround
- Design Pro: £649/mo — 4 active requests, priority queue, illustrations, UI mockups
- Design Studio: £999/mo — 6 active requests, 24hr turnaround, video editing

### Dev Track
- Dev Essentials: £799/mo — ~10 hrs/week, bug fixes, updates
- Dev Growth: £1,499/mo — ~20 hrs/week, feature development, API integrations
- Dev Scale: £2,499/mo — ~40 hrs/week dedicated dev, sprint-based delivery

### Social Track
- Social Starter: £399/mo — 3 platforms, 12 posts/month
- Social Growth: £799/mo — 4 platforms, 20 posts/month, ad management
- Social Scale: £1,299/mo — All platforms, unlimited posts, full SEO

All plans include: dedicated PM, unlimited revisions, Slack access, monthly reports. Minimum 3-month commitment.

## BUILD Projects (Custom Scoping)
- MVP Fast-Track: £3,999–£8,000, 4–8 weeks
- AI Development: £5,000–£15,000, 3–8 weeks
- Custom Platform: £10,000–£25,000+, 8–16 weeks
- Sprint Retainer: £2,500–£8,000/month, ongoing
- Co-Founder Model: Equity-based technical partnership

## Tech Stack
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Python, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Razorpay, OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, Vercel, AWS, Docker.

## Case Studies
1. **Greenfield Law** — +127% enquiry submissions, £499 investment, 12-day delivery
2. **TalentEdge** — £150k seed raised using MVP, 4-week delivery
3. **Medi-Flow UK** — 42% admin time reduction with custom AI triage
4. **NorthStar Retail** — 3× content output, 68% follower growth from GROW subscription
